scripts.deploy:dev: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam build --template-file template.yaml && PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam deploy --config-env dev
scripts.deploy:staging: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam build --template-file template.yaml && PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam deploy --config-env staging
scripts.deploy:prod: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam build --template-file template.yaml && PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam deploy --config-env prod
scripts.local:invoke:shopify-products: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam local invoke ShopifyGetProductsFunction --template-file template.yaml --env-vars env.local.json
scripts.local:invoke:jotform-forms: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam local invoke JotformGetFormsFunction --template-file template.yaml --env-vars env.local.json
scripts.local:invoke:airtable-listings: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam local invoke AirtableGetListingsFunction --template-file template.yaml --env-vars env.local.json
scripts.local:invoke:airtable-users-create: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam local invoke AirtableCreateConfiguredRecordFunction --template-file template.yaml --env-vars env.local.json
scripts.local:invoke:ai-identify: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam local invoke AiIdentifyEquipmentFunction --template-file template.yaml --env-vars env.local.json
scripts.local:invoke:gmail-send: PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$HOME/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH sam local invoke GmailSendFunction --template-file template.yaml --env-vars env.local.json
